message:
Harden snapshot restore validation and fix depth computation cycle safety

snapshot_restore.rs:
- Added duplicate obligation ID detection: builds an obligation_ids HashSet
  and checks for duplicates, emitting DuplicateId { kind: "obligation" }
  errors just like regions and tasks already do
- Fixed potential infinite loop in compute_max_depth(): added a visited
  HashSet to the parent chain walk so cyclic region trees (where region A
  is parent of B and B is parent of A) terminate instead of hanging. The
  cycle is already detected and reported by validate() as CyclicRegionTree,
  but the depth computation ran before that check and could spin forever.
- Added test duplicate_obligation_id_detected: verifies that two obligations
  with the same ID produce a DuplicateId error
- Added test cyclic_region_tree_detected_without_depth_hang: creates a
  two-node cycle and verifies both that CyclicRegionTree is reported and
  that max_depth is bounded (2, not infinite)

network/config.rs:
- Modernized three assert format strings from positional format!()
  arguments to inline {var:?} syntax for consistency with the rest of the
  codebase (clippy::uninlined_format_args)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
